{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322110133DC719B34F828BAE99930\"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7443287382806790975","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书让我深受触动，它讲述了人类在灾难面前的坚韧与不屈。书中描写的灾难场景令人刻骨铭心，但是那些与灾难抗争的人们却展现出了无比坚强的灵魂。就像书中所说：“他们从灾难中奋起，与灾难抗争，任何苦难都不曾令高傲的人类屈服。”这句话让我看到了人类的伟大。这本书不仅让我们回顾历史，更让我们对未来充满希望。推荐给所有人！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731838286,"group_id":"7438553195791518745","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/wSBQf8PTYK9c+9WHRpIlQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"81837808946554","user_name":"爱吃杂菜粉丝煲的万神之祖"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"81837808946554","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7438553195791518745","book_info":{"abstract":"人类的历史，就是灾难与发展共存的历史。在漫漫的历史长河中，有一些令人恐惧、令人刻骨铭心、令人终生不能忘怀的灾难，始终沉淀在人类的记忆中，一代代流传……经过这些灾难洗礼的人类，却无比坚强、无比决绝——他们从灾难中奋起，与灾难抗争，任何苦难都不曾令高傲的人类屈服。他们。终于成为自然的强者，成为生命之者。在这儿，我们追溯着历史的记忆，回顾那惨烈的一幕幕往事；我们试图展现在灾难面前那坚强的人类的灵魂，以此献给过去、现在，乃至未来，始终与灾难相抗争的生灵。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/f886a274c9f3cba9b4e2fe0a1c03e549~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"吴正清","author_id":"","book_id":"7438553195791518745","book_name":"大灾难","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c87828","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"2.6万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":948,\"name\":\"社会文化\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=948\u0026name=社会文化\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":50,\"name\":\"社会科学\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=50\u0026name=社会科学\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7487904019772361790","read_count":"337","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"205042"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"21","tags":"社会文化,社会科学","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f886a274c9f3cba9b4e2fe0a1c03e549~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779332493\u0026x-signature=fFLOyHZYuivkXqQmE%2BBPRg7dV5A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322110133DC719B34F828BAE99930\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3960,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":328},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7573637123586851646","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"人类还在伤害地球，废水就是证据"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763377703,"group_id":"7438553195791518745","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"哦哦哦哦哦哦哦哦哦哦哦哦哦哦。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0WvhgdRZh+xbVCCjvxNZ5AH5q08d+5uBwfhoTFdvNzK","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776705984\u0026x-signature=QHDhoc9A4xYYe1ipmBRBiQQhjZY%3D","user_id":"4239331349509263","user_name":"书虫大灵"},"expand_
